title: BOOST Pet Beef Tripe - Air-Dried Grain-Free Treats for Dogs, 100% Natural Dog Chews, Single Ingredient Real Beef Tripe, High in Protein, No Preservatives - 150 Grams
features: AIR-DRIED DOG TREATS: Natural, air-dried treats made with a single ingredient - ideal for training, rewarding or spoiling; free from additives, grains or guilt so you can treat your dog with confidence
100% BEEF: Made from pure beef tripe, these healthy dog treats are packed with flavour and nutrition - high-value, high-protein snacks with no nasties or fillers
HIGH IN PROTEIN FOR MUSCLE SUPPORT: Protein-rich dog treats made with real beef tripe to help maintain lean muscle mass and support strength in dogs of all sizes and breeds

SUPPORTS HEALTHY BONES: Made from natural beef tripe, these single-ingredient dog treats are rich in calcium and phosphorus, essential minerals that help build and maintain strong bones and overall skeletal health
PROMOTES DENTAL HEALTH: Air-dried tripe treats not only deliver natural nutrition, but the chewing action helps reduce plaque and tartar buildup - supporting cleaner teeth and better oral health
description: Product description Our dog food and cat food ranges are carefully developed by BOOST’s team of vets and animal nutritionists and equally prioritise taste and health when cooking. We are what we eat, and so are our pets. Providing pet food that is rich in fresh, highly nutritious, human-grade ingredients can significantly enhance your pet’s health and well-being. Ingredients 100% Beef Directions See Packaging for Feeding Directions See more
